metadata.method_name: M1 KG-Localized Single-Absorber Unlearning vs Dense Parent Erasure (joint collateral+fluency)
metadata.description: At MATCHED forget-quality, ablate ONE KG-named absorber latent (KG-ABL) vs erase the dense diff-of-means parent direction (DENSE-ABL, baseline f). WIN <=> KG-ABL has lower sibling/parent collateral AND better fluency on a joint retain-quality x fluency outcome, with a paired-bootstrap KG-minus-dense CI excluding 0. Toxicity insult co-firing case is the honest negative pole (KG predicted to lose, router-consistent).
